text: 英語聽力模擬視題,17.
zh: 英语听力模拟视题,17.

text: 第一節
zh: 第一节

text: 聽下面五段對話,每段對話後有一個小題,
zh: 听下面五段对话,每段对话后有一个小题,

text: 從題中所給的ABC三個選項中選出最佳選項,
zh: 从题中所给的ABC三个选项中选出最佳选项,

text: 聽完每段對話後,你都有十秒鐘的時間
zh: 听完每段对话后,你都有十秒钟的时间

text: 來回答有關小題和閱讀像小題,
zh: 来回答有关小题和阅读像小题,

text: 每段對話都兩遍,
zh: 每段对话都两遍,

text: 現在你有五秒鐘的時間閱讀第一小題的有關內容。
zh: 现在你有五秒钟的时间阅读第一小题的有关内容。

text: I wanted to invite my friend to go fishing,
zh: 我想邀请我的朋友去钓鱼，

text: but my phone can't make video calls.
zh: 但我的手机不能视频通话。

text: Is it broken?
zh: 它坏了吗？

text: Can you help me check?
zh: 你能帮我检查一下吗？

text: Sure, Grandpa, let me see.
zh: 当然，爷爷，让我看看。

text: Oh, you just accidentally turned off the internet connection.
zh: 哦，你只是不小心关掉了网络连接。

text: I wanted to invite my friend to go fishing,
zh: 我想邀请我的朋友去钓鱼，

text: but my phone can't make video calls.
zh: 但我的手机不能视频通话。

text: Is it broken?
zh: 它坏了吗？

text: Can you help me check?
zh: 你能帮我检查一下吗？

text: Sure, Grandpa, let me see.
zh: 当然，爷爷，让我看看。

text: Oh, you just accidentally turned off the internet connection.
zh: 哦，你只是不小心关掉了互联网连接。

text: You're not going to Amy's beach party?
zh: 你不去艾米的海滩派对吗？

text: You'll regret it.
zh: 你会后悔的。

text: I have no choice.
zh: 我别无选择。

text: I have to prepare for the speech competition.
zh: 我必须准备演讲比赛。

text: That competition made you miss the road trip last weekend, too.
zh: 那次比赛让你上周末错过了公路旅行。

text: I know.
zh: 我知道。

text: I already regret signing up for it.
zh: 我已经后悔报名参加了。

text: You're not going to Amy's beach party?
zh: 你不去艾米的海滩派对吗？

text: You'll regret it.
zh: 你会后悔的。

text: I have no choice.
zh: 我别无选择。

text: I have to prepare for the speech competition.
zh: 我必须为演讲比赛做准备。

text: That competition made you miss the road trip last weekend, too.
zh: 那场比赛也让你错过了上周末的跑车之旅。

text: I know.
zh: 我知道。

text: I already regret signing up for it.
zh: 我已经后悔报名参加了。

text: What are you doing?
zh: 你在干什么？

text: I'm packing because I'm going to New York on business with my boss.
zh: 我在收拾行装，因为我要和我的老板去纽约出差。

text: The flight leaves in four hours.
zh: 飞机在四个小时后起飞。

text: Remember to take your coat because there's a drop in temperature.
zh: 记得带上外套，因为气温会下降。

text: What are you doing?
zh: 你在做什么？

text: I'm packing because I'm going to New York on business with my boss.
zh: 我在收拾行李，因为我和老板去纽约出差。

text: The flight leaves in four hours.
zh: 飞机在四个小时后起飞。

text: Remember to take your coat because there's a drop in temperature.
zh: 记得带上外套，因为气温降低了。

text: Hey, could you stop pacing around?
zh: 嘿，你能不能停止来回踱步？

text: You're like a cat on hot bricks.
zh: 你就像是坐立不安的猫。

text: I just can't calm down.
zh: 我就是无法平静下来。

text: What if I can't make it to the badminton final?
zh: 如果我无法参加羽毛球决赛怎么办？

text: Don't worry.
zh: 别担心。

text: I have full confidence in your skills.
zh: 我对你的技能充满信心。

text: But I'm afraid I might let you down.
zh: 我担心我会让你失望。

text: Hey, could you stop pacing around?
zh: 嘿，你能停止来回踱步吗？

text: You're like a cat on hot bricks.
zh: 你就像烫手的山芋一样。

text: I just can't calm down.
zh: 我就是无法平静下来。

text: What if I can't make it to the badminton final?
zh: 如果我不能参加羽毛球决赛怎么办？

text: Don't worry.
zh: 别担心。

text: I have full confidence in your skills.
zh: 我对你的技能充满信心。

text: But I'm afraid I might let you down.
zh: 但我担心我会让你失望。

text: Miss Brown is truly amazing.
zh: 布朗小姐真是太厉害了。

text: Her research on the effects of diet on fighting cancer has made new breakthroughs.
zh: 她在饮食对抗癌症的影响研究中取得了新突破。

text: Absolutely.
zh: 绝对。

text: Scientists like her are constantly pushing back the boundaries of human knowledge.
zh: 她们这样的科学家不断拓展人类知识的边界。

text: We should study hard to become people like her.
zh: 我们应该努力学习，成为像她们一样的人。

text: Miss Brown is truly amazing.
zh: 布朗小姐真是令人惊叹。

text: Her research on the effects of diet on fighting cancer has made new breakthroughs.
zh: 她在饮食对抗癌症的影响方面的研究取得了新的突破。

text: Absolutely.
zh: 绝对。

text: Scientists like her are constantly pushing back the boundaries of human knowledge.
zh: 她们这样的科学家不断拓展人类知识的边界。

text: We should study hard to become people like her.
zh: 我们应该努力学习，成为像她们一样的人。

text: Second,
zh: 第二，

text: Everything goes in step by step.
zh: 一切都是一步一步进行的。

text: Every step with a few tricks to change from side step to side
zh: 每一步都有几个技巧，可以从一边换到另一边。

text: In the real world they will pick three at the first touches.
zh: 在现实世界中，他们会在第一次接触时挑选三个。

text: Every step with a few tricks to change from side to side
zh: 每一步都有几个技巧，可以从一边换到另一边。

text: You will create time for details.
zh: 你会为细节创造时间。

text: Every step is five seconds.
zh: 每一步都是五秒钟。

text: The third step,
zh: 第三步，

text: Yes, keep up the fast,
zh: 是的，保持快节奏，

text: This fish burger is really delicious. I'm going to have it again tomorrow.
zh: 这个鱼汉堡真的很好吃。我明天还要再吃一次。

text: You seem to really like burgers. Do you know what the world's first burger chain was?
zh: 你好像真的很喜欢汉堡。你知道世界上第一个汉堡连锁店是什么吗？

text: I guess it must be McDonald's or maybe Burger King?
zh: 我猜想是麦当劳或者可能是汉堡王吗？

text: Neither. It was White Castle, founded by Billy Ingram in 1921.
zh: 都不是。白宫汉堡王是由比利·英格拉姆于1921年创立的。

text: I've never heard of it before. How did you know about it?
zh: 我以前从来没听说过。你是怎么知道它的？

text: I used to work at White Castle. I'm pretty good at making chicken burgers.
zh: 我以前在白宫汉堡王工作过。我很擅长做鸡肉汉堡。

text: Want to learn? I can write down the necessary materials and steps to make them for you.
zh: 想学吗？我可以写下必要的材料和步骤，教你做。

text: That's great. This fish burger is really delicious.
zh: 太棒了。这个鱼汉堡真好吃。

text: I'm going to have it again tomorrow. You seem to really like burgers.
zh: 明天我要再吃一次。你好像真的很喜欢汉堡。

text: Do you know what the world's first burger chain was?
zh: 你知道全球第一个汉堡连锁店是什么吗？

text: I guess it must be McDonald's or maybe Burger King?
zh: 我猜想是麦当劳或者可能是汉堡王吗？

text: Neither. It was White Castle, founded by Billy Ingram in 1921.
zh: 都不是。白宫汉堡王是由比利·英格拉姆于1921年创立的。

text: I've never heard of it before. How did you know about it?
zh: 以前从没听说过。你是怎么知道的？

text: I used to work at White Castle. I'm pretty good at making chicken burgers.
zh: 我曾在白堡工作。我很擅长做鸡肉汉堡。

text: Want to learn? I can write down the necessary materials and steps to make them for you.
zh: 想学吗？我可以为你写下制作所需的材料和步骤。

text: That's great.
zh: 太棒了。

text: I'm thinking about getting a pet. Do you have one?
zh: 我在考虑养只宠物。你有吗？

text: Yes. A rabbit and two cats. What kind of pet would you like?
zh: 有。一只兔子和两只猫。你想要什么样的宠物？

text: My landlord won't allow me to have a dog, so maybe I'll have a cat.
zh: 我的房东不允许我养狗，所以我可能会养只猫。

text: Did you get your cats online or from a friend?
zh: 你是在网上买的猫，还是从朋友那里领养的？

text: I bought all of my pets from a pet shop near my neighborhood.
zh: 我所有的宠物都是在我附近的宠物店购买的。

text: That must have cost you a lot.
zh: 那一定花了你很多钱。

text: Yes. You can go to the local animal shelter to have a look.
zh: 可以。你可以去当地的动物收容所看看。

text: Good idea. But my cousin is staying with me in my apartment this week,
zh: 好主意。不过这一周我表弟正在我公寓住，她对动物毛发过敏。

text: and she's allergic to animal hair.
zh: 所以或许我得把计划推迟到下周了。

text: So I might have to postpone the plan until the following week.
zh: 好的。如果有更多问题，随时给我打电话。

text: Okay. If you have any more questions, feel free to call me.
zh: 我在考虑养一只宠物。你有吗？

text: I'm thinking about getting a pet. Do you have one?
zh: 有的。一只兔子和两只猫。你想要什么宠物？

text: Yes. A rabbit and two cats. What kind of pet would you like?
zh: 我的房东不让养狗，所以也许我会养一只猫。

text: My landlord won't allow me to have a dog, so maybe I'll have a cat.
zh: 你的猫是在网上买的还是从朋友那里领养的？

text: Did you get your cats online or from a friend?
zh: 我所有的宠物都是在我附近的宠物店买的。

text: I bought all of my pets from a pet shop near my neighborhood.
zh: 我把所有宠物都是在我附近的宠物店购买的。

text: That must have cost you a lot.
zh: 那一定花了很多钱。

text: Yes. You can go to the local animal shelter to have a look.
zh: 是的。你可以去当地的动物收容所看看。

text: Good idea. But my cousin is staying with me in my apartment this week,
zh: 好主意。但是这周我表妹正在我公寓里住，

text: and she's allergic to animal hair.
zh: 她对动物的毛发过敏。

text: So I might have to postpone the plan until the following week.
zh: 所以我可能得把计划推迟到下周了。

text: Okay. If you have any more questions, feel free to call me.
zh: 好的。如果你有任何问题，随时给我打电话。

text: It's said that this year's Odd Sox Day falls on November 13th.
zh: 据说今年的奇蹩袜日是在11月13日。

text: Odd Sox Day? What's it about, Amy?
zh: 奇蹩袜日？艾米，这是什么活动？

text: Basically, participants wear mismatched socks to schools,
zh: 基本上，参与者穿不搭配的袜子去学校，

text: workplaces, or at home to stand against prejudice and accept differences.
zh: 工作场所或家里，以抗议偏见，接受不同。

text: I participated in Odd Sox Day 2024, which was on November 12th.
zh: 我参加了2024年的“不洋气袜子日”，这是在11月12日。

text: That sounds meaningful. So you wore mismatched socks to school that day?
zh: 听起来很有意义。那你那天穿了不搭配的袜子去学校？

text: Yeah. I wore a blue knee-high sock on my left foot and a yellow ankle sock on my right.
zh: 是的。我左脚穿了一只蓝色过膝袜，右脚穿了一只黄色短袜。

text: Sounds cool. Besides wearing Odd Sox, what else can participants do?
zh: 听起来很酷。除了穿不洋气袜子，参与者还能做什么？

text: They can post photos of their mismatched socks on social media,
zh: 他们可以在社交媒体上发布他们不搭配袜子的照片，

text: or donate money to the official website of this event.
zh: 或者捐款给这个活动的官方网站。

text: I donated all my pocket money, five pounds to support the cause.
zh: 我捐出了所有的零花钱，五英镑来支持这个事业。

text: Can I celebrate Odd Sox Day with you on November 13th?
zh: 我可以在11月13日和你一起庆祝不洋气袜子日吗？

text: Sure, but this date is not the one officially announced on the official website.
zh: 当然可以，但这个日期不是官方网站上宣布的日期。

text: I'll let you know when the exact date is announced.
zh: 我会在确切日期宣布时通知你。

text: It's said that this year's Odd Sox Day falls on November 13th.
zh: 据说今年的不同袜子日是在11月13日。

text: Odd Sox Day? What's it about, Amy?
zh: 不同袜子日？艾米，这是什么活动？

text: Basically, participants wear mismatched socks to schools, workplaces, or at home
zh: 基本上，参与者会穿着不同款式的袜子去学校、工作场所或家里，

text: to stand against prejudice and accept differences.
zh: 以表达对偏见的反对和接纳不同之处。

text: I participated in Odd Sox Day 2024, which was on November 12th.
zh: 我参加了2024年的不同袜子日，那天是11月12日。

text: That sounds meaningful. So you wore mismatched socks to school that day?
zh: 听起来很有意义。那你那天穿了不同款式的袜子去学校吗？

text: Yeah, I wore a blue knee-high sock on my left foot
zh: 是的，我左脚穿了一只蓝色长筒袜，

text: and a yellow ankle sock on my right.
zh: 右脚穿了一只黄色短筒袜。

text: Sounds cool. Besides wearing Odd Sox, what else can participants do?
zh: 听起来很酷。参与者除了穿不同款式的袜子之外，还能做什么？

text: They can post photos of their mismatched socks on social media,
zh: 他们可以把自己的不同袜子的照片发布在社交媒体上。

text: or donate money to the official website of this event.
zh: 或者捐钱给这个活动的官方网站。

text: I donated all my pocket money, five pounds to support the cause.
zh: 我捐出了我所有的零用钱，五英镑来支持这个事业。

text: Can I celebrate Odd Sox Day with you on November 13th?
zh: 11月13日我能和你一起庆祝奇怪袜子日吗？

text: Sure, but this date is not the one officially announced on the official website.
zh: 当然可以，但这个日期并不是官方网站上正式公布的日期。

text: I'll let you know when the exact date is announced.
zh: 我会在确切的日期宣布时通知你。

text: Can you recommend some TV dramas that are suitable for teenagers?
zh: 你能推荐一些适合青少年的电视剧吗？

text: Sure, first, there's the Baby Sitters Club.
zh: 当然可以，首先是《保姆俱乐部》。

text: The show is based on the popular series of books by Anne M. Martin.
zh: 这部剧是基于安·M·马丁的畅销系列书籍改编而成的。

text: It's about a group of friends who start a babysitting business.
zh: 故事讲述一群朋友开办了一个保姆业务。

text: However, each girl faces her own personal challenges.
zh: 然而，每个女孩都面临着自己的个人挑战。

text: I'm not really into that kind of theme.
zh: 我并不是特别喜欢那种题材。

text: Is there anything with a more unique plot?
zh: 有没有更独特情节的东西？

text: Absolutely. Try Hannah Montana.
zh: 当然有。试试《汉娜·蒙塔娜》。

text: The main character, Miley Stewart, needs a double life.
zh: 主角麦莉·斯图尔特需要过双重生活。

text: To most people, she's just a normal teenager,
zh: 对大多数人来说，她只是一个普通的青少年，

text: but her closest family and friends know her secret.
zh: 但她最亲近的家人和朋友知道她的秘密。

text: She's also a famous pop singer.
zh: 她也是一位著名的流行歌手。

text: Sounds interesting. I'll watch it.
zh: 听起来很有趣。我会看的。

text: I also recommend another show called Keenan and Kel.
zh: 我还推荐另一部叫做《基南和凯尔》的节目。

text: It first aired in August 1996 and concluded in May 2000.
zh: 它首次播出于1996年8月，最后在2000年5月结束。

text: Oh, I've seen this drama before, but I didn't finish it because it felt a bit outdated.
zh: 哦，我以前看过这部戏，但因为感觉有点过时，所以没有看完。

text: Can you recommend some TV dramas that are suitable for teenagers?
zh: 你能推荐一些适合青少年的电视剧吗？

text: Sure, first, there's the Baby Sitters Club.
zh: 当然，首先是《百变小妞俱乐部》。

text: The show is based on the popular series of books by Anne M. Martin.
zh: 这部节目是根据安妮·M·马丁的畅销书系列改编的。

text: It's about a group of friends who start a babysitting business.
zh: 讲述了一群朋友开创了一个托儿所的故事。

text: However, each girl faces her own personal challenges.
zh: 但是，每个女孩都面临着自己的个人挑战。

text: I'm not really into that kind of theme.
zh: 我并不是很喜欢那种题材。

text: Is there anything with a more unique plot?
zh: 有没有什么更独特情节的？

text: Absolutely. Try Hannah Montana.
zh: 当然有。试试《汉娜蒙塔娜》吧。

text: The main character, Miley Stewart, needs a double life.
zh: 主人公麦莉·斯图尔特需要过双重生活。

text: To most people, she's just a normal teenager,
zh: 大多数人认为她只是一个普通的青少年，

text: but her closest family and friends know her secret.
zh: 但她最亲近的家人和朋友知道她的秘密。

text: She's also a famous pop singer.
zh: 她还是一位著名的流行歌手。

text: Sounds interesting. I'll watch it.
zh: 听起来很有趣。我会看的。

text: I also recommend another show called Keenan and Kel.
zh: 我还推荐另一部叫《基南和凯尔》的节目。

text: It first aired in August 1996 and concluded in May 2000.
zh: 这部节目首次播出是在1996年8月，最后一集是在2000年5月。

text: Oh, I've seen this drama before, but I didn't finish it because it felt a bit outdated.
zh: 哦，我以前看过这部剧，但没有看完，因为感觉有点过时。

text: In 2018, Miley's husband Marlon died in a skiing accident.
zh: 2018年，麦莉的丈夫马龙在滑雪事故中去世了。

text: His sudden death turned Miley's world upside down.
zh: 他突然的去世让麦莉的世界颠倒了过来。

text: When Carla, one of Miley's closest friends, heard the awful news,
zh: 当卡拉，麦莉最亲近的朋友之一，听到这个可怕的消息时，

text: she knew right away that she wanted to help.
zh: 她立刻知道自己想要帮助。

text: Carla and Miley met 10 years ago at a parent-teacher conference.
zh: Carla和Miley在10年前的家长会议上认识。

text: Carla's son and Miley's daughter were classmates.
zh: Carla的儿子和Miley的女儿是同学。

text: They had a lot in common.
zh: 她们有许多共同点。

text: They both volunteered in the community and loved cooking and hiking.
zh: 她们都是社区志愿者，喜欢烹饪和远足。

text: Carla knew Miley already had crucial daily support from her sister,
zh: Carla知道Miley已经得到她姐姐Kathy O'Brien的重要日常支持，后者来到她身边。

text: Kathy O'Brien, who had come to stay with her.
zh: 但她想为Miley做更多。

text: But she wanted to do more for Miley.
zh: 她创建了一个滚动日历，31位女性（即日历女孩们）每个月在特定的日子为Miley做一件小事。

text: She created a rolling calendar where 31 women, the calendar girls,
zh: 她创立了一个滚动日历，其中有31位女性，即日历女郎，

text: would each do a small thing for Miley every month on a specific day.
zh: 每个月在特定的日子为麦莉做一点小事。

text: Carla made sure to note which dates might be especially hard.
zh: 卡拉确保记录下哪些日期可能特别难过。

text: Miley's birthday in April, the couple's anniversary in July and Marlon's birthday in August.
zh: 4月是麦莉的生日，7月是夫妇的纪念日，8月是马龙的生日。

text: Throughout the year, Miley's calendar girls supported her in various ways.
zh: 整年下来，麦莉的月历女孩们以各种方式支持她。

text: Nicole, who lived three houses away, brought delicious hot meals,
zh: 住在三条街外的尼科尔带来美味的热餐，

text: along with flowers and a card.
zh: 还有鲜花和卡片。

text: Tony, who also lived in the neighborhood, would often meet Miley for a walk.
zh: 住在附近的托尼经常和麦莉一起散步。

text: When Miley looks back on the year after Marlon died,
zh: 在马龙去世后回顾这一年时，

text: it is with both deep sadness and deep gratitude.
zh: 麦莉既感到深深的悲伤又感激。

text: I hadn't had any really huge losses before,
zh: 以前我从未经历过真正巨大的损失，

text: so I don't think I knew the value of having that much support.
zh: 所以我想我不知道拥有这么多支持是多么宝贵。

text: She reflects.
zh: 她在反思。

text: In 2018, Miley's husband Marlon died in a skiing accident.
zh: 2018年，麦莉的丈夫马龙在滑雪事故中身亡。

text: His sudden death turned Miley's world upside down.
zh: 他突然的离世颠覆了麦莉的世界。

text: When Carla, one of Miley's closest friends, heard the awful news,
zh: 当卡拉，麦莉最亲密的朋友之一，听到这个可怕的消息时，

text: she knew right away that she wanted to help.
zh: 她立刻知道她想要帮助。

text: Carla and Miley met 10 years ago at a parent-teacher conference.
zh: 卡拉和麦莉在10年前的家长会上相识。

text: Carla's son and Miley's daughter were classmates.
zh: 卡拉的儿子和麦莉的女儿是同班同学。

text: They had a lot in common.
zh: 他们有许多共同之处。

text: They both volunteered in the community and loved cooking and hiking.
zh: 他们都在社区做志愿者，喜欢烹饪和徒步旅行。

text: Carla knew Miley already had crucial daily support from her sister,
zh: 卡拉知道麦莉已经从她的姐姐那里得到了至关重要的日常支持。

text: Kathy O'Brien, who had come to stay with her.
zh: 凯西·奥布莱恩已经来和她住在一起。

text: But she wanted to do more for Miley.
zh: 但她想要为麦莉做更多的事情。

text: She created a rolling calendar where 31 women, the calendar girls,
zh: 她创建了一个滚动日历，31位女性，即日历女孩们，

text: would each do a small thing for Miley every month on a specific day.
zh: 每个月的特定日期为麦莉做一件小事。

text: Carla made sure to note which dates might be especially hard.
zh: 卡拉确保记录哪些日期可能特别困难。

text: Miley's birthday in April, a couple's anniversary in July,
zh: 麦莉四月的生日，七月的一对夫妇纪念日，

text: and Marlon's birthday in August.
zh: 以及八月的马龙生日。

text: Throughout the year, Miley's calendar girls supported her in various ways.
zh: 整年下来，麦莉的日历女孩们以各种方式支持她。

text: Nicole, who lived three houses away, brought delicious hot meals,
zh: 住在三条街之外的妮可，带来美味的热饭菜，

text: along with flowers and a card.
zh: 还有花和一张卡片。

text: Tony, who also lived in the neighborhood, would often meet Miley for a walk.
zh: 托尼也住在附近，经常会和麦莉一起散步。

text: When Miley looks back on the year after Marlon died,
zh: 当麦莉回顾马龙去世后的一年，

text: it is with both deep sadness and deep gratitude.
zh: 她既感到深深的悲伤，也感恩涕雨。

text: I hadn't had any really huge losses before,
zh: 我以前从未经历过真正巨大的损失，

text: so I don't think I knew the value of having that much support.
zh: 所以我想我并不知道拥有这么多支持的价值。

text: She reflects.
zh: 她反思道。
